hooks.command: git log --oneline -10 --grep='AGENT_EVENT:' --all || echo 'Multi-agent coordination active - checking for recent agent activity'

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): SESSION_START | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | cwd: $(pwd)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: session_start | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Agent session started'

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): SESSION_STOP | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | cwd: $(pwd)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: session_stop | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Agent session ended'

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): PRE_COMMIT | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | preparing commit" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git checkout.*-b' && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): BRANCH_CREATE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | creating new branch" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null) && if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != .claude/* ]]; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): FILE_MODIFY_START | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | file: $FILE_PATH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit'; then COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): COMMIT_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | hash: $COMMIT_HASH | branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: commit_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | hash: $COMMIT_HASH | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push'; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): PUSH_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | branch: $BRANCH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: push_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | branch: $BRANCH | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git merge'; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): MERGE_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | merged into: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: merge_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null) && if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != .claude/* ]]; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): FILE_MODIFY_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | file: $FILE_PATH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; fi

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): TASK_CREATED | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | task: $(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.subject // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: task_created | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Task created'

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): TASK_COMPLETED | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | task: $(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.subject // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: task_completed | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-agent} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Task completed'
